hooks.command: Set-Location 'D:\Nitin\Claude Projects'; git add -A; $status = git status --porcelain; if ($status) { $msg = "Auto-commit: $(Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')"; git commit -m $msg; git push origin dev; git checkout master; git merge dev; git push origin master; $env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('PATH','Machine') + ';' + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('PATH','User'); vercel --prod 2>&1; git checkout dev } else { Write-Host 'Nothing to commit' }
